title: Psychotria psychotriifolia
taxonomy: Psychotria psychotriifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family, which comprises over 60,000 known species of flowering plants. Psychotria psychotriifolia is native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America, where it thrives in humid and shaded environments. The plant is part of the Psychotria genus, which includes approximately 1,800 species worldwide. Psychotria psychotriifolia is often found in tropical forests, where it grows as a shrub or small tree.
